requirement.description: The gateway shall transmit a reverse gear indication to the rear camera ECU when reverse gear is engaged.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import time
import can
import pytest

GW_REVERSE_GEAR_ID = 0x111
GW_REVERSE_GEAR_DLC = 8

# ---------------------------
# CAN Bus Fixture
# ---------------------------
@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.Bus(
        interface="vector",      # vector / socketcan / pcan configurable
        channel=0,
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

# ---------------------------
# Utility Functions
# ---------------------------
def collect_messages(bus, msg_id, duration_sec):
    messages = []
    start_time = time.time()
    while time.time() - start_time < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.5)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == msg_id:
            messages.append(msg)
    return messages


def decode_reverse_active(msg):
    return (msg.data[0] >> 0) & 0x01

test_cases.title: Verify GW_ReverseGear message transmission presence
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; CAN monitoring tool connected and configured to capture message ID 0x111
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_ReverseGear message
test_cases.expected_result: GW_ReverseGear message is present on the CAN bus
test_cases.postcondition: Switch ignition OFF; disconnect CAN monitoring tool

test_cases.title: Verify reverse gear inactive state forwarding
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; gear selector not in reverse
steps: Ensure reverse gear is not engaged

test_cases.title: Verify reverse gear active state forwarding
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_ReverseGear message
test_cases.expected_result: ReverseActive = 1 transmitted to the rear camera ECU
test_cases.postcondition: Disengage reverse gear; stop CAN monitoring

test_cases.title: Verify reverse gear disengagement forwarding
Verify no unintended toggle of ReverseActive
Verify GW_ReverseGear message DLC
Verify immediate reverse gear indication on engagement
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; reverse gear not engaged
test_cases.expected_result: ReverseActive = 1 is transmitted in the first available CAN frame
test_cases.postcondition: Disengage reverse gear; stop CAN monitoring
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_rev_007_immediate_forwarding(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_REVERSE_GEAR_ID, 1)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_reverse_active(msgs[-1]) in (0, 1)

test_cases.title: Verify GW_ReverseGear stops on Gateway power OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_rev_008_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_REVERSE_GEAR_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_REVERSE_GEAR_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
